text.title: Property-Based Tests From LLM-Inferred Invariants Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the test-property-based-llm-invariants methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: verify-purity
step.action: Confirm the function has no I/O, no global mutation. If impure, STOP.
step.decision-gate: If impure, switch to contract/example tests.

step.name: ground-invariants
step.action: Agent reads source, proposes invariants per family, cites text for each.

step.name: write-property-tests
step.action: Translate each invariant into @given/fast-check/proptest with pinned seeds.

step.name: shrink-and-minimize
step.action: On failure, let the library shrink. Capture the minimal input.

step.name: add-example-snapshot
step.action: Pin the minimized example as a regression test (example-based).
